title: BEM-841 verify Claude response
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 07:38 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
responses=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p)
            low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            if 'bem840' in low or 'diagnosis_and_patch_plan' in low:
                responses.append({'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:1200]})
status='bem840_claude_response_present' if responses else 'bem840_claude_response_missing'
next_action='process Claude diagnosis and patch plan' if responses else 'dispatch or retry Claude auditor with BEM-840 task; do not accept header-only response'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'responses':responses,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_verify_claude_bem840_response.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_verify_claude_bem840_response.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Verify Claude BEM-840 Response | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_verify_claude_bem840_response.json','governance/reports/bem841_verify_claude_bem840_response.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified whether Claude produced the required BEM-840 diagnosis and patch plan response')
"""
No issue comments.
